headline: Charter to Hold Webcast to Discuss First Quarter 2026 Financial and Operating Results
summary: Charter Communications, Inc. (NASDAQ: CHTR) (the "Company" or "Charter") will host a webcast on Friday, April 24, 2026 at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time (ET) to discuss financial and operating results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. A press release reporting such results will be issued at 7:00 a.m. ET on April 24.

headline: SPECTRUM BUSINESS AND RINGCENTRAL EXPAND PARTNERSHIP WITH AI CONTACT CENTER AND CONVERSATION INTELLIGENCE TO TRANSFORM CUSTOMER EXPERIENCES
summary: Spectrum and RingCentral, Inc. (NYSE: RNG), a global leader in AI-powered business communications, today announced a significant expansion of their partnership to make RingCentral's RingCXTM, an AI-first omnichannel contact center, and its AI Conversation Expert (ACETM), advanced conversation intelligence, available to Spectrum Business customers.
